title: Rate Limit Exhausted
description: Emitted when the wall-clock rate-limit budget is spent across short + long tiers.

state.description: State name that exhausted rate-limit retries

short_retries.description: Retries attempted in the short-burst tier

long_retries.description: Retries attempted in the long-wait tier

total_wait_seconds.description: Accumulated wall-clock seconds spent in rate-limit waits

next.description: Next state the FSM transitions to, or null if none
